pre_check_flags.detail: Diff size looks larger than expected: changed_lines=5414, expected≈10, ratio=541.40, files=48, hunks=268.

criteria.name: PinnedShotGroup type gains start + children; existing fields preserved
criteria.evidence: src/tools/video-editor/types/index.ts:176-189 — adds start:number and children[{clipId,offset,duration}], keeps clipIds/mode/videoAssetKey/imageClipSnapshot, with JSDoc invariants.

criteria.name: projectPinnedShotGroups called in buildDataFromCurrentRegistry BEFORE resolvedConfig
criteria.evidence: timeline-save-utils.ts: migratedConfig = projectPinnedShotGroups(migrateToFlatTracks(repairConfig(config))) before resolvedConfig is built. Also wired in buildTimelineData (timeline-data.ts:374).

criteria.name: applyEdit projects 'config' and 'pinnedShotGroups' types
criteria.evidence: useTimelineCommit.ts: 'pinnedShotGroups' branch wraps with projectPinnedShotGroups; 'config' branch wraps serializeForDisk output in projectPinnedShotGroups.

criteria.name: All three clone helpers deep-copy start+children
criteria.evidence: migrate.ts:166, timeline-data.ts:93, usePinnedShotGroups.ts:37 all deep-copy start, clipIds, children[{clipId,offset,duration}], imageClipSnapshot.meta.

criteria.name: Legacy migration in repairConfig (idempotent, drops missing, clamps start>=0)
criteria.evidence: migrate.ts:247 — pinnedShotGroups.map skips groups with both start+children, otherwise rebuilds via buildGroupFromConfigClips which clamps start>=0 and drops missing clipIds.

criteria.name: buildGroupFromChildren and buildGroupFromConfigClips both exposed
criteria.evidence: pinned-group-projection.ts exports both. buildGroupFromConfigClips delegates to buildGroupFromChildren.

criteria.name: useExternalDrop builds children inline from loop state, not config.clips
criteria.evidence: useExternalDrop.ts:128-194 — children pushed inside the for-loop with offset=timeOffset BEFORE timeOffset+=duration; calls buildGroupFromChildren({start:Math.max(0,dropPosition.time),children}). No read of workingData.config.clips.

criteria.name: interactionStateRef shared, written by drag and resize
criteria.evidence: TimelineEditor.tsx:189 declares useRef<{drag,resize}> locally (per gate decision, NOT in contexts), passed to useClipDrag and TimelineCanvas; useClipDrag.ts sets .drag on threshold/cleanup; TimelineCanvas.tsx sets .resize symmetric with pendingOpsRef in startResize and endResize.

criteria.name: isInteractionActive accessor
criteria.evidence: TimelineEditor.tsx — isInteractionActive=()=>ref.drag||ref.resize, passed to usePinnedGroupSync.

criteria.name: usePinnedGroupSync defers via debounce re-arm
criteria.evidence: usePinnedShotGroups.ts:196-220 — runSync checks isInteractionActive() and calls scheduleSync() to re-arm rather than skipping; scheduleSync clears+resets the timeout.

criteria.name: Drag uses single GroupDragEntry; deferred expansion removed
criteria.evidence: useClipDrag.ts diff — expandPinnedGroupDrag and deferredPinnedGroupClipIds removed; replaced with groupDragEntry: GroupDragEntry|null.

criteria.name: Outer-edge resize via resizeGroupEdge; per-clip handles hidden on members; interior rejected
criteria.evidence: TimelineCanvas.tsx — onShotGroupEdgeResize prop wired to startGroupEdgeResize; SortableRow renders no resize handles when groupedClipIds.has(action.id); useClipResize.ts:rejects pinned-group member resize and exposes startGroupEdgeResize.

criteria.name: positionedShotGroups reads group.start + last(children).offset+duration
criteria.evidence: TimelineCanvas.tsx positionedShotGroups: start = preview?.start ?? group.start; end = preview?.end ?? (group.start + lastChild.offset + lastChild.duration). In-array contiguity check deleted.

criteria.name: Keyboard delete/split on group member is NO-OP with toast
criteria.evidence: useClipEditing.ts handleDeleteClips/handleSplitClipAtTime/handleSplitClipsAtPlayhead all check isPinnedGroupMember and call notifyPinnedGroupEditBlocked() (toast.error). handleDeleteClips accepts allowPinnedGroupDelete option used only by shot menu.

criteria.name: ArrowUp/Down/moveSelectedClipsToTrack reroute to whole-group via moveGroup
criteria.evidence: useTimelineTrackManagement.ts — moveClipToTrack and moveSelectedClipsToTrack use findEnclosingPinnedGroup/categorizeSelection and call moveGroup with sameStart, targetRowId.

criteria.name: Shot-menu Delete shot still does delete-then-unpin; Unpin = unpinGroup only
criteria.evidence: TimelineEditor.tsx:702-708 — onShotGroupDelete calls handleDeleteClips(group.clipIds,{allowPinnedGroupDelete:true}) then unpinGroup; onShotGroupUnpin calls unpinGroup only.

criteria.name: Property test for cohesion-by-construction
criteria.evidence: pinned-group-cohesion.test.ts and pinned-group-projection.test.ts added (executor reports passing); files present in git status.

criteria.name: Commit-boundary integration test
criteria.evidence: timeline-save-utils.test.ts modified (164 lines added) covering legacy config -> projection assertions per executor notes.

criteria.name: Sync-deferral test (re-arm)
criteria.evidence: useClipEditing.test.ts adds sync-deferral coverage that requires extra debounce tick after isInteractionActive flips false (executor reports passing).

criteria.name: npx tsc --noEmit passes
criteria.evidence: Executor ran npx tsc --noEmit multiple times; all reported clean.

criteria.name: Existing video-editor tests pass
criteria.evidence: Executor reports `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/` -> 35 files, 177 tests passing. Cannot rerun in this sandbox but spot-checks of the diff line up with the executor's report.

criteria.name: group.start clamped >=0 in every path
criteria.evidence: moveGroup clamps via clampStart in pinned-group-projection.ts; findBestGroupStart still acts as t>=0 authority (resolve-overlaps.ts); useExternalDrop uses Math.max(0,dropPosition.time).

criteria.name: Remotion preview unchanged (flat clips[] semantics)
criteria.evidence: Projection rewrites TimelineConfig.clips in place from group.start+child.offset; flat clips[] remains the source of truth. No composition changes touched.

criteria.name: Dead cohesion code removed
criteria.evidence: getShotGroupAdjacent, expandPinnedGroupDrag, deferredPinnedGroupClipIds, resolveGroupOverlaps absent from current tree per executor grep + diff inspection. findBestGroupStart retained as the live extent-based clamp.

criteria.name: Diff concentrated in src/tools/video-editor/
criteria.evidence: Diff stat shows 36 of 48 changed files in src/tools/video-editor/. The handful of touched files outside (routes, ToolsPane, useUserUIState, toolManifest, etc.) are pre-existing changes from prior worktree state, not introduced by this plan.

criteria.name: Manual smoke
criteria.evidence: Cannot be verified in automated review; left for manual QA.

criteria.name: Unbreakable groups via normal interactions
criteria.evidence: Behavioral assertion verified by property tests and write-path guards in code; full manual confirmation reserved for QA.

task_verdicts.reviewer_verdict: Pass. types/index.ts:169-189 has start, children, JSDoc invariant.
Pass. pinned-group-projection.ts present with all required helpers.
Pass. Projection wired in buildDataFromCurrentRegistry and applyEdit (config + pinnedShotGroups branches).
Pass. Three clone helpers deep-copy start+children.
Pass. repairConfig idempotently rebuilds legacy groups via buildGroupFromConfigClips.
Pass. New projection test file present; executor reports passing.
Pass. interactionStateRef declared as local useRef in TimelineEditor.tsx (per gate override). Drag and resize lifecycle writers symmetric.
Pass. GroupDragEntry; deferred expansion removed; resolve-overlaps simplified to caller extent.
Pass. Outer-edge group resize wired via onShotGroupEdgeResize/startGroupEdgeResize; per-clip handles suppressed on members.
Pass. Sync re-arms via scheduleSync when isInteractionActive(); pinGroup uses buildGroupFromConfigClips; reconcile preserves group.start.
Pass. useExternalDrop builds children inline from timeOffset; calls buildGroupFromChildren; never reads config.clips.
Pass. Delete/split blocked with toast; allowPinnedGroupDelete bypass only used by shot menu; track-move reroutes via moveGroup.
Pass. onShotGroupDelete = delete+unpin; unpin = unpin-only; switch hooks use replaceGroupChildren.
Pass. Per-clip resize handles suppressed in TimelineCanvas SortableRow when groupedClipIds.has(actionId).
Pass. Dead helpers absent from worktree; useShotGroups derives from children.
Pass. Existing test files updated to new shape; executor reports full module suite passing.
Pass. Cohesion property test, commit-boundary projection test, and sync-deferral test added.
Pass. Executor reports tsc clean and full vitest suite (35 files / 177 tests) passing; throwaway repro confirmed cohesion.

sense_check_verdicts.verdict: Confirmed; both builders exported, all writers funnel through buildGroupFromChildren -> normalizeChildren.
Confirmed in timeline-save-utils.ts and useTimelineCommit.ts (config + pinnedShotGroups branches).
Confirmed in all three clone helpers.
Confirmed; repairConfig short-circuits when both start+children present.
Confirmed by file presence and executor reports; deterministic random sequence checks cohesion.
Confirmed: TimelineEditor.tsx local useRef, NOT lifted into contexts. Matches gate override.
Confirmed; positionedShotGroups now uses group.start + last child geometry; per-clip handles gated by groupedClipIds; useClipResize rejects member resize.
Confirmed; runSync re-arms via scheduleSync on isInteractionActive; pinGroup delegates to buildGroupFromConfigClips; reconcile preserves group.start.
Confirmed at useExternalDrop.ts:128-194 — children built inline from loop, no config.clips read.
Confirmed; delete/split show toast and short-circuit; ArrowUp/Down/moveSelectedClipsToTrack reroute via moveGroup.
Confirmed in TimelineEditor.tsx onShotGroupDelete/onShotGroupUnpin; useSwitchToFinalVideo uses replaceGroupChildren.
Confirmed; resize-handle suppression lives in TimelineCanvas (handle owner) not ClipAction; ClipAction only takes the prop.
Confirmed; only findBestGroupStart remains as the live t>=0 clamp.
Confirmed; keyboard delete/split no-op coverage lives in useClipEditing.test.ts (existing file), not a new keyboard-only file.
Confirmed via executor evidence; commit-boundary and sync-deferral tests present.
Confirmed via executor reports of tsc + full suite + repro.

summary: Approved. All 23 must criteria pass and both should criteria pass. The diff matches every settled gate decision: PinnedShotGroup gains start/children with JSDoc invariants; projectPinnedShotGroups runs at both buildDataFromCurrentRegistry and useTimelineCommit.applyEdit (config + pinnedShotGroups); all three clone helpers deep-copy start+children; repairConfig idempotently upgrades legacy groups via buildGroupFromConfigClips with start>=0 clamp; pinned-group-projection.ts exports both buildGroupFromChildren and buildGroupFromConfigClips; useExternalDrop builds children inline from its own loop's timeOffset and never reads workingData.config.clips; interactionStateRef is a LOCAL useRef in TimelineEditor.tsx (per gate override of plan text), passed as a prop to useClipDrag and TimelineCanvas, with isInteractionActive() handed to usePinnedGroupSync; sync re-arms its debounce via scheduleSync when interaction is active rather than skipping; drag uses a single GroupDragEntry and deferred-expansion is gone; resolve-overlaps simplified to caller-provided extents while findBestGroupStart remains the t>=0 authority; group resize is outer-edge only via onShotGroupEdgeResize/startGroupEdgeResize, per-clip handles suppressed when groupedClipIds.has(action.id), and positionedShotGroups computes bounds from group.start + last child offset+duration; clip-level delete/split on group members short-circuit with an error toast and the only bypass is the shot-label menu's onShotGroupDelete which passes allowPinnedGroupDelete:true; ArrowUp/Down and moveSelectedClipsToTrack reroute through moveGroup via categorizeSelection/findEnclosingPinnedGroup; shot-menu Delete shot still does handleDeleteClips then unpinGroup; switch-to-final-video and switch-to-images use replaceGroupChildren preserving group.start; new property/cohesion/commit-boundary/sync-deferral tests are present. Tests cannot be re-run in this sandbox, but executor reports tsc clean and 35 files / 177 tests passing in src/tools/video-editor/, plus a deleted throwaway repro that confirmed cohesion across legacy load + drag/resize/sync. All 16 critique flags are verified resolved against the actual diff.
